Title: Son of Sardaar
Description: After returning to his parents' village, a man becomes the latest target in a long-standing family feud.

Title: Mitti
Description: The movie revolves around the Punjabi youth politics and 4 guys for whom their land is their mother which cannot be sold.

Title: Ek Villain
Description: Ek Villain is a Hindi thriller movie of a gangster Guru (Sidharth Malhotra) whose life changes after he falls in love with Aisha (Shraddha Kapoor) and decides to mend his ways. When Aisha gets murdered by a psychotic serial killer Rakesh (Riteish Deshmukh), Guru begins to search for the culprit. Watch Ek Villain to see Guru’s obstacle ridden journey in search for Aisha’s murderer

Title: Heer Ranjha - A True Love Story
Description: Heer Ranjha takes us back to the immortal eternal love story shard between the most romantic lovers of all time Heer and Ranjha.

Title: Bol
Description: A religious Muslim family refuses to accept their transgender son, which creates a conflict within the family and ends up tearing them apart.

Title: Agent Vinod
Description: Watch Mahendra Sandhu and Jagdeep's classic spy thriller that nattily unfolds a web of startling mysteries.

Title: Kochadaiiyaan - The Legend - Hindi
Description: Rana, a noble warrior, seeks revenge against his father's killer, Rishikodagan. Meanwhile, he also upsets and attracts the ire of the enemy kingdom's ruler, Raja Mahendran.

Title: Toonpur Ka Superrhero
Description: The story revolves around Aditya Kumar who accidentally lands in the world of cartoons and transforms into a real life hero.

Title: Dishkiyaoon
Description: Given a choice between ambition and revenge, only a deadly mind would pick both. Viki picks both. Big dreams, big cost. Actions have consequences.

Title: Warning
Description: WARNING is a 3D UNDERWATER film about seven friends stuck in a life-threatening crisis. The lucky ones will die first and the rest will go through the worst nightmares of their lives.

Title: Always Kabhi Kabhi
Description: The film revolves around four characters whose destinies seem to take them on different paths. Somehow, though, they all come together at St.Marks.

Title: Kambakkht Ishq
Description: A romantic comedy about a successful Indian stuntman who takes Hollywood by the storm but cannot find true love.

Title: Teri Meri Kahaani
Description: Three couples from three different eras find love and despite the trials and tribulations they face along the way, destiny seems determined to keep them together.

Title: Vaada Raha - I Promise
Description: When Duke meets with an accident, he is abandoned by his lover Nalini and friends, until a young boy enters his life and brings back the hope.

Title: Raanjhanaa
Description: A small-town boy, Kundan, needs to break through the class divide to gain acceptance from his childhood love who is in love with big city ideals.

Title: Khiladi 786
Description: Khiladi 786 is a Hindi comedy movie, in which Mansukh (Himesh Reshammiya) accepts the challenge of getting Indu (Asin), an underworld don's sister married to a cop to prove his worth. Bahattar (Akshay Kumar), a cop from a village in Punjab gets his life entangled with Mansukh and Indu. Watch Khiladi 786 and the see the chaotic madness that ensues due to this entanglement!

Title: Pankh
Description: The film focuses on a phenomenon that was peculiar to the film industry, the practice of casting children in roles opposite to their natural genders.

Title: Go Goa Gone
Description: A group of friends visit a rave party on a remote island in Goa only to find that the island is infested with Zombies.

Title: Bajatey Raho
Description: A hilarious con-comedy where a group of people decides to con the cunning businessman who is actually responsible for swindling them.

Title: Rangeelay
Description: When Sunny accidentally takes Simmi's scooter, a love-hate relationship develops when he tries to return the scooter to its rightful owner.

Title: Goliyon Ki Raasleela Ram-Leela
Description: Ram Leela is a tragic love story of Ram (Ranveer Singh) and Leela (Deepika Padukone). The movie set up in Gujarat showcases an on-going rivalry between the two families and a love story that blooms while hiding from this rivalry. Watch Ram Leela, a Hindi movie that makes you realise the strength that love can bring amongst two people to protect their innocent love from their families.

Title: Purani Jeans
Description: Purani Jeans is a film based on the belief that friendship is like a pair of old jeans -- the more you wear them the better it gets.

Title: R... Rajkumar
Description: Rajkumar, an aimless young man, works for a drug baron and is sent to kill a rival dealer. His life changes when he sets eyes on the beautiful Chanda.

Title: Sahi Dhandhe Galat Bande
Description: When the son of a politician is abducted, the kidnappers play a dangerous double game to support activists against land grabbing by the Government.

Title: Filhaal
Description: Rewa is devastated when she comes to know she cannot bear a child. So, her best friend, Sia offers to be the surrogate mother.

Title: De Dana Dan
Description: Nitin and Ram have been given an ultimatum by their rich girlfriends to either earn money or leave them alone. What follows then is a hilarious series of events!

Title: Housefull
Description: A mascot for bad luck, Aarush's life turns into comical chaos after his wife runs away on the honeymoon night.

Title: Tera Mera Ki Rishta
Description: A young man and woman from different backgrounds fall in love with each other but face problems later and separate.

Title: Badlapur
Description: Badlapur is a Hindi crime drama movie. Raghu (Varun Dhawan) was a happily married man, before losing his wife Misha (Yami Gautam) & his son to two bank robbers: Liak (Nawazuddin Siddiqui) & Harman (Vinay Pathak). Years later, Raghu might get a chance to take revenge against the killers for which he has patiently waited. Watch Badlapur to know if Raghu succeeds in avenging his family!

Title: Tevar
Description: Caught in the middle of a lethal unrequited love, a kabaddi player tries to safeguard a young woman from an unwanted marriage with a dangerous faction leader.

Title: Lekar Hum Deewana Dil
Description: A year in the young and passionate lives of Dino and Karishma who go through friendship, disillusionment, conflict and heartbreak until they realize true love.

Title: NH10
Description: On their way to a weekend retreat, Arjun and Meera find their dream vacation turn into a nightmare when they cross path with a dangerous gang.

Title: Vicky Donor
Description: A man is reluctantly brought in to donate his sperm by an infertility doctor, and eventually, he ends up becoming the biggest sperm donor of his clinic.

Title: Nanhe Jaisalmer
Description: A young boy in a poor family of Rajasthan is a big fan of Bobby Deol. Imagine his surprise when Bobby Deol comes face to face with him.

Title: Happy Ending
Description: A confused writer goes on the search for inspiration for his next story and falls in love with a best seller author who doesn't believe in love.

Title: English Vinglish
Description: English Vinglish is a heart-touching Hindi family drama movie about Sashi Godbole (Sridevi) who is an insecure & under confident middle-class housewife. Her struggle to speak & understand English is ridiculed by her own family. Watch English Vinglish to witness the transformation of Sashi, who tries to overcome this language barrier and eventually turn into a much more confident woman.

Title: Saadi Love Story
Description: Preeti's sister is hospitalized after an accident, and two men show up claiming to be her fiance.

Title: Ra.One
Description: Ra One is a Hindi Sci-Fi movie about Shekhar (Shah Rukh Khan) a gaming programmer, who develops an indestructible virtual character named Ra.One (Arjun Rampal). Soon, fiction turns to reality when Ra.One enters the real world to kill Shekhar & his son Prateek. Another virtual character G.One comes to rescue Prateek & Sonia (Kareena Kapoor). Watch Ra.One to know about the winner of final battle?

Title: Manmarziyaan
Description: Manmarziyaan is Hindi romantic drama movie about an candid Punjabi girl Rumi (Taapsee Pannu) who is madly in love with Vicky (Vicky Kaushal). He is commitment phobic & fails to give a long term promise to Rumi. On the other hand, Rumi's parents pressure her for marriage and she agrees to marry Robbie (Abhishek Bachchan). Watch Manmarziyaan to know what happens to Rumi & Vicky's relationship...

Title: Money Hai Toh Honey Hai
Description: Six struggling aspirants get an SMS informing them that they are now the owners of an INR 1,000-crore company. But, the company has a loan of INR 1,200 crore, which they will have to repay.

Title: No Problem
Description: Raj and Yash have conned Zandulal and fled to Durban. Now Zandulal takes the help of inspector Arjun to catch them but ends up in messy situations instead.

Title: Partner
Description: Partner is a Hindi rom-com movie about Bhaskar (Govinda) who is in love with his boss Priya (Katrina Kaif). Bhaskar takes tips from 'Love Guru' Prem (Salman Khan), who believes he knows everything about women and way to their hearts. However, both of them keep failing to woo their ladies and always end up in funny misunderstanding. Watch Partner to see how they try and impress their lady love!

Title: Shirin Farhad Ki Toh Nikal Padi
Description: A middle aged Parsi couple find love at the most unexpected places and...time!

Title: Shubh Mangal Saavdhan
Description: Shubh Mangal Saavdhan is a romantic comedy movie about Mudit Sharma (Ayushmann Khurrana) & Sugandha (Bhumi Pednekar). This Hindi movie displays the strong bond between the couple. A few days before their wedding, Mudit encounters a personal problem, the issue gets so big that it is escalated to their extended families. Watch Shubh Mangal Saavdhan to see what happens next in their lives...

Title: Chintu Ji
Description: Chintu Ji is a satirical comedy movie which focuses on the rivalry between two villages Hadbahedi and Triphla.

Title: Rockstar
Description: Rockstar is a Hindi romantic drama movie on a typical Delhi boy Janardhan (Ranbir Kapoor) who chases his dream to be a Rockstar. He falls in love with the most popular girl Heer (Nargis Fakhri) in Delhi University but it doesn't go so smoothly. Watch Rockstar to witness the journey of Janardhan from a heart broken boy to a popular Rockstar sensation who expresses his tragedy through his songs.

Title: London Dreams
Description: Arjun (Ajay) heads to London to become a singing sensation. What will happen when his best friend — Mannu — (Salman) beats him to it?

Title: Table No. 21
Description: At first, a couple is thrilled to participate in a game show with a huge cash prize, until they find out that the game isn't for fun, it's for survival.

Title: Dil Ne Jise Apna Kahaa
Description: Rishabh and wife Pari lead a happy life until Pari meets with an accident and passes away. Later her heart gets transplanted into a girl named Dhani.

Title: Happy Husbands
Description: HAPPY HUSBANDS is a fantastic movie about Husbands, their philosophy towards life and what they go through on a personal level after they are married.

Title: Be-Careful
Description: Two womanizing friends trapped in controlling marriages see a chance to have some fun on a Bangkok trip but get more than what they asked for.

Title: Veer
Description: A Pindari prince goes to England to study military tactics so that he can avenge his people but instead ends up falling in love there.

Title: 5 Ghantey Mein 5 Crore
Description: The story of chartered accountant Vikram and his keep Soniya who are waiting for another accountant Muqaadam to deliver 5 crores of cash at their farmhouse.

Title: Tutiya Dil
Description: Karan and Rhea are in a relationship. When, Karan dumps her, she seeks shelter in her colleague Vishal's house. Tragedy strikes when Karan returns.

Title: Chaalis Chauraasi (4084)
Description: A crime thriller with a touch of humour about four cops who see an opportunity to carve out a great future when an extraordinary mission comes their way.

Title: Chaar Sahibzaade - Rise of Banda Singh Bahadur
Description: Witness the extraordinary story of an immortal warrior.

Title: Ambikapathy
Description: A small-town boy, Kundan, needs to break through the class divide to gain acceptance from his childhood love who is in love with big city ideals.

Title: Janleva 555
Description: While making a movie about the hazards of snake bites, a young woman (Kalpana Pandit) comes to the realization that she was a serpent in a previous life.

Title: One Two Three
Description: Hell breaks loose in a comedy of errors when three men, all named Laxminarayan, cross paths for a common goal!

Title: Chalo Dilli
Description: Chalo Dilli is a Hindi comedy movie about Mihika (Lara Dutta) who is an executive banker, who misses her flight to Delhi. Manu (Vinay Pathak), an auto-rickshaw driver tries to help Mihika to reach her destination. Enroute, they discover the semblance and colors of urban and rural areas that make India. Watch Chalo Dilli to know if Mihika will reach her destination with Manu's help!

Title: Chaar Din Ki Chandni
Description: This comedy-drama with an essence of romance is set in a four-day wedding in Rajasthan.

Title: Qissa Panjab
Description: Qissa Panjab is a film that gives you an insight into the lives of the youth of Punjab - Six young people, the paths they choose and the choices they make.

Title: Anjaana Anjaani
Description: Two strangers who meet over a bridge, make a pact and travel together on a journey, get to know each other all that while!

Title: Action Jackson
Description: Action Jackson is a Hindi movie about a small time crook, Vishi (Ajay Devgn) who falls in love with Khushi (Sonakshi Sinha). Few days later, Vishi meets his look-alike AJ, a professional assassin & right-hand of underworld criminal. When Vishi & AJ meet a lot of commotion and chaos takes place in their lives. Watch Action Jackson to see what all drama happens in Vishi & AJ’s life.

Title: Sadda Adda
Description: Six boys from different states come together to share a two BHK flat in a middle-class colony, which they lovingly call 'Sadda Adda'. Their every day stories are lessons waiting to be learned.

Title: Kyon Ki...Its Fate
Description: After accidentally killing his fiancee, Anand becomes insane and is admitted to a psychiatric hospital. Tanvi, his doctor, falls in love with him, but her father does not approve, given his past.

Title: Taur Mittran Di
Description: 2 boys set in Khalsa College, Amritsar are consumed by their rivalry in and aim at having an upper hand over each other.

Title: Drona
Description: One man's spectacular voyage that will force him to face his fears and make him the hero he was born to become.

Title: Haathi Mere Saathi
Description: Watch the bond between humans & elephants with Bandev’s story as he fights for the protection of his ele-friends. Witness the rage on ‘Haathi Mere Saathi’, full movie streaming in Hindi on Eros Now.

Title: Tanu Weds Manu Returns
Description: Watch Tanu Weds Manu Returns starring Kangana Ranaut & R. Madhavan, a fun-filled ride to see how the romantic dynamics of this couple changes after the entry of a new character.

Title: Oru Kidayin Karunai Manu
Description: To fulfill a promise to God, a newlywed couple along with their families and a goat set on a road trip that soon turns into a comical adventure!

Title: English Vinglish - Tamil
Description: The challenges of an ordinary middle class woman who is not proficient with the English language, and how she overcomes them. Starring Sridevi, in her comeback after 14 years.

Title: Chaar Sahibzaade - Rise of Banda Singh Bahadur - Punjabi
Description: Witness the extraordinary story of an immortal warrior.

Title: Love Possible
Description: This is a love story of shrewd secretary and Childish boss and her friend who believes in settling down by marrying a rich person.

Title: Cocktail
Description: Cocktail is a Hindi rom-com movie based on a love triangle between Gautam (Saif Ali Khan), Veronica (Deepika Padukone) & Meera (Diana Penty). The movie shows the bond between three friends who meet in London. All is well as Gautam & Veronica instantly click but things start to get bumpy as Meera & Gautam fall for each other. Watch Cocktail to see who Gautam chooses between Veronica and Meera.

Title: Sniff
Description: Witness the adventures of India's first-ever spy superhero Sunny Gill, who's out to solve mysteries with his powerful nose!

Title: Hum Dono
Description: Hum dono is the story of two look-alikes, one a small-time goon, the other a sophisticated doctor.

Title: Happy Phirr Bhag Jayegi
Description: Happy gets kidnapped by a group of gangsters, but what happens when they realize that they got the wrong Happy?

Title: Ye Stupid Pyaar
Description: Abhishek marries an Indian girl. On their wedding night, his wife, Neha doesn't want to leave her father. Abhishek joins his Bangkok office and offers Neha that they celebrate their wedding night there. What happens when Abhishek meets his college sweetheart there?

Title: Aladin
Description: Aladin is a contemporary look at the classic fairy tale wherein Aladin and Genius the genie has to face the hideous Ringmaster.

Title: Hijack
Description: A plane is hijacked by six terrorists who demand the release of Rashid Omar, their accomplice, or else the hostages will be killed.

Title: White
Description: Mamootty & Huma Quereshi are caught in an unlikely bond that stems from a dark past and a darker future.

Title: 3 Bachelors
Description: This is a film about two 'young bachelors' and one 'young at heart' bachelor. It's a humorous take on their respective love stories.

Title: Shareek
Description: Shareek addresses the ruthless land wars in feudal Punjab through an emotionally charged story between two families.

Title: Lingaa
Description: After being turned down by the ruling Britons, the rightful heir to a famous dynasty inspires local villagers to build a dam for themselves.

Title: Uttama Villain
Description: The story of a modern superstar overlaps with that of an eighth-century character he plays.

Title: Buddha Mar Gaya
Description: When LK dies on the night before the IPO opens, the family decides to hide the death until the shares are all sold out.

Title: & Jara Hatke
Description: A film about social norms, generation gaps, second chances and the tough choices that parents make for their children and sometimes when children have to do the same.

Title: Dekh Tamasha Dekh
Description: A political satire based on a true story revolving around the search for the religious identity of a poor man crushed under the weight of a politician's hoarding.

Title: Monchora - The Heart Stealer
Description: A prized family heirloom is about to rip apart lives, love and faith.

Title: Chakravyuh
Description: Chakravyuh is the story of a man who is sent to a Naxal group as an informant, who in turn begins to sympathise with them.

Title: Rangeela
Description: Mili's ambition of becoming a famous actor is met with several hurdles when Raj Kamal, a noted actor, and Munna, her childhood friend, both fall in love with her.

Title: Mai - Love Your Mother
Description: Mai is a story of an old desolate mother suffering from Alzheimer and is being tossed between her four children.

Title: Challo Driver
Description: Story of a young construction magnate and arts graduate from Chandigarh who is looking for excitement in her career and hence becomes his chauffeur.

Title: Omkara
Description: In Shakespeare's masterpiece 'Othello' set in modern India, watch how a politically-minded enforcer's misguided trust in his lieutenant leads him to suspect his wife of infidelity.

Title: Gandhi My Father
Description: A story of Harilal Gandhi, first son of Mohandas Gandhi. The movie portrays how Harilal's efforts fail to become a good son to his father.

Title: Pehli Nazar Ka Pyaar
Description: After losing the man she loves to her cousin, a woman gets her hopes up when he is widowed.

Title: Tere Naam
Description: Tere Naam is about Radhe's (Salman Khan) troubled life. He's carefree but a short tempered boy who falls in love Nirjara (Bhumika Chawla) and starts to pursue her. However, tragedy strikes in their love story when a street fight leads to Radhe being hospitalized with severe head injuries causing amnesia. Watch Tere Naam to find out how Radhe's and Nirjara's life takes a turn after his head injury!

Title: Sarkar 3
Description: Watch Sarkar rise once again, not only against the threats from the political and corporate world but also from his own grandson, Shivaji Nagre!

Title: Mukhtiar Chadha
Description: A fun-filled comedy film about Mukhtiar Chadha who lost his father due to poverty. Thereafter, his only aim in life is to make money either by hook or crook.

Title: Desi Boyz
Description: Two friends lose their jobs as the global recession hits, but their worlds really turn hilariously upside-down when they become male escorts to make ends meet.

Title: Guru - Marathi
Description: A small time conman finds himself in a soup of problems after he witnesses a murder in the city.

Title: Phuntroo
Description: Phuntroo is the tale of an engineering student who when spurned by his love, decides to build a better version of her with artificial intelligence.

Title: Hote Hote Pyaar Ho Gaya
Description: A couple marries their respective partners to please their parents but fight with them, to get back with their first love.

Title: Sanam Teri Kasam
Description: Sanam Teri Kasam is a romantic tragedy displaying the pursuit of eternal love. The movie is based on a love story between Saru & Inder. Saru is a geek who is desperately looking for a husband due to her family's pressure for marriage. Saru meets Inder who changes her life and their love story blossoms. Watch Sanam Teri Kasam to see these two characters grow together in their unusual love story.

Title: Housefull 3
Description: Laugh to your heart's content in this comedy-drama as three men try to convince a father that they are a perfect match for his daughters!

Title: Shuttlecock Boys
Description: Shuttlecock Boys revolves around the lives, successes and failures of four friends who hail from lower-middle-class backgrounds in Delhi.

Title: Jeena Hai Toh Thok Daal
Description: Originating from the dark and gruesome underbelly of Bihar, Jeena Hai Toh Thok Daal is a story of the conscientious journey of four outlaws who set out to Mumbai for a mission.

Title: Strings of Passion
Description: Neel, Aman and Amit are the members of the band 'Strings of Passion' but are shadowed by the influences of drugs, broken love and bad parenting.

Title: Pyari Behna
Description: Pyari Behna explores the camaraderie between siblings and how one accident changes their lives forever.

Title: Cigarette Ki Tarah
Description: A guy lands in deep trouble after falling in love but does not give up.

Title: Ab To Aaja Saajan Mere
Description: When two inseparable companions fall in love with the same guy, which one will the guy choose forms the rest of the story.

Title: Who's There
Description: Sunny and Muskan's honeymoon plans go for a toss when Sunny sees Jay's Muskan's ex-boyfriend Jay's ghost! Will they be able to survive this honeymoon?

Title: Sunday
Description: Sunday is a Hindi comedy movie about Sehar (Ayesha Takia) who is unable to remember a particular Sunday in her life & then is suspected of a murder. A.C.P Rajveer (Ajay Devgn) takes up the case to solve the mystery & encounters that Sehar had interacted with many people & all of them spotted Sehar at the crime scene. Watch Sunday to find out the events which entangled Sehar in a murder case.

Title: Dhama Chaukdi
Description: Four underworld dons - Mani Aiyer from Madras, Pappu Yadav from Bihar, Lallan Pyare from UP and Sanjay Apte from Mumbai - are staunch enemies, having businesses in Mumbai. What happens as a result of this rivalry?

Title: Bezubaan
Description: A young woman must try to keep a one-night stand that she had in college, a secret from her husband who happens to be one of his best friends.

Title: Kitaab
Description: A funny yet sensitive story that expressively captures the thinking of children and their fantasies of adulthood.

Title: Say Yes To Love
Description: Vijay was molested by a prostitute as a child. This incident leaves him so traumatized that he develops the fear of interaction with girls.

Title: Shakal Pe Mat Ja
Description: SPMJ is a story of 4 young boys who get caught up as suspects at the Delhi international airport, on a high alert day. They get caught while capturing an American Airlines aircraft landing on their camera, which they claim to have shot for a documentary that they are making.

Title: Main Krishna Hoon
Description: Krishna, an orphan, lives in an orphanage. He feels unwanted as all his friends have found someone to adopt them. However, his sadness turns into happiness when Lord Krishna comes to his aid.

Title: Kinara
Description: This story is based on a love triangle, where Inder loves Aarti but she is still in love with Chandan!

Title: Rakhtbeej
Description: Rakhtbeej is the story of two men, from two different generations. Even though their worlds are different their lives keep intersecting.

Title: Phobia
Description: Mehak - talented artist, victim of assault and agoraphobic - feels she's possessed when she has visions in her new house.

Title: Gang
Description: Four friends, lured by quick money, form a dangerous gang undertaking criminal activities all the while completely ignoring how it affects their personal relationships.

Title: Paathshaala
Description: A new English school-teacher ends up leading both, teachers and students, to revolt against the school management for what's right.

Title: Aligarh
Description: Based on true events, a university professor is sacked from his job on charges of homosexuality.

Title: Nil Battey Sannata
Description: Nil Battey Sannata is a thought-provoking tale of Chanda, whose only dream in life is to provide her daughter Appu an education and a respectable life.

Title: Qasam Se Qasam Se
Description: Qasam Se Qasam Se is a story of two young lovers who must overcome friendship, parents and all odds to come together.

Title: 3G
Description: 3G follows Sam and Sheena's Fiji vacation gone wrong, as their new 3G phone brings phantom calls and paranormal terrors.

Title: Switchh
Description: Stealing, speeding and doing it all in style. Get your heart racing as Vikrant Massey and gang plan the biggest con in #Switchh.

Title: Second Marriage Dot Com
Description: Akshay is the son of single parent Suneel Narang. He embarks on a journey to get his widower father married. Co-incidentally in Jaipur, a vibrant young girl Poonam is on the same hunt to find a partner for her mother Shoma, a single parent. They get in touch with each other through a matrimonial website named secondmarriage.com

Title: Zindagi 50-50
Description: Three common people pursue ambitious dreams and learn that it takes more than perpetual struggle to achieve them.

Title: Dishoom
Description: When a top Indian cricketer goes missing, two officers, Kabir and Junaid undertake a 36-hour action-packed man hunt to find him!

Title: Bhoot Returns
Description: Sequel to the horror film Bhoot in which a family moves into a house haunted by a ghost.

Title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
Description: A girl decides to sprint out of her own wedding and has people from not one but two countries chasing after her.

Title: Shubh Kaamna
Description: A classic entertainer in which Ratan decides to help secretly by arranging Sujata's marriage with Mr. Mehra. But is this what Sujata and Mr. Mehra really want?

Title: Lady Robinhood
Description: When her husband is brutally murdered, a lady police officer decides to find the killers and avenge his death in Lady Robinhood directed by Surinder Kapoor.

Title: Ki & Ka
Description: A gender-bender role-reversal romantic drama, Ki & Ka is the story of an ambitious woman and her stay-at-home husband.

Title: Bajirao Mastani
Description: Bajirao Mastani is an unapologetic war-time love story that once blossomed as Bajirao (Ranveer Singh), a warrior falls in love with Mastani (Deepika Padukone) while being married to Kashibai (Priyanka Chopra). This Hindi movie revolves around themes such as sacrifice & acceptance of love. Watch Bajirao Mastani to see the challenges Bajirao, Mastani and Kashibai go through to uphold their love.

Title: Its Rocking: Dard E Disco
Description: It's Rocking - Dard-E-Disco is the story of two fun-loving brothers. Rambo and Rocky who dream of opening their own discotheque like the happing Dard-E-Disco, owned by disco king DK.

Title: Le Gaya Saddam
Description: The story depicts the Muslim divorce system, which is based on Shariyat Law that is leading to the push and pull in an ever-evolving society.

Title: Swayamvar
Description: In order to teach a stringent woman a lesson, two brothers take up disguises and set out to woo her daughters for marriage.

Title: Provoked
Description: A true story of an Indian woman incarcerated for murdering her abusive husband who had her conviction overturned in a case that changed British law.

Title: Heroes
Description: Heroes is a Hindi patriotic drama film of two film school students Sammy (Sohail Khan) & Ali (Vatsal Seth). Working on their documentry project 'Why Not to Join Defence' they travel a thousand miles to deliver 3 letters to armed forces officers. While delivering letters, they realize something about these officers. Watch Heroes to know what was it that they realised & how they made their project.

Title: Salaam-e-Ishq
Description: Six couples face problems in their lives when fate forces them to move away from each other. They must overcome these issues in order to make their love triumphant.

Title: Swarag Narak
Description: Three married couples start having problems in their marriage when a third person comes into the picture.

Title: Shamitabh
Description: A mute, aspiring actor joins forces with a man who has a powerful voice. Together they take the film industry by storm, but will their egos get in the way?

Title: Love Aaj Kal
Description: The story that comes after two lovers break up when they realize that their career goals are pulling them in different directions.

Title: Login
Description: The film is about 3 different individuals & how the usage of the Internet & social networking sites has affected their lives completely.

Title: Hum Tumhare Hain Sanam
Description: A man who loves his wife dearly feels that she is giving undue attention to her friend. As a result, he grows very suspicious resulting in throwing his wife out of the house after his jealousy completely overwhelms him.

Title: Aa Dekhen Zara
Description: A photographer has nothing going for him until he inherits a camera with an ability to predict the future but has to ultimately face the dark side of reality.

Title: Overtime
Description: Overtime is the story of Khushi who lives in Mumbai, working as a 'High Profile Call Girl' but with the dreams of becoming a heroine one day.

Title: Ghar Ghar Ki Kahani
Description: A drama about 2 neighboring families - one which is honest but poor and the other uses any means to rise up the ladder of wealth quickly.

Title: Rajdhani Express
Description: Rajdhani Express is the story of Keshav, an errand boy for an arms trafficker who wants to escape his life of crime.

Title: Banjo
Description: Taraat, a banjoist hailing from a poor background, and his associates get the offer of a lifetime when they are approached by Christina, a musician from the US.

Title: Aa Eradu Varshagalu
Description: A gen-next couple, Varun and Varsha, keep their relationship limited to social media. What happens when their relationship comes out in the open?

Title: Roll No. 56
Description: A 12-year-old is compelled to run away from his house after he’s unable to deal with the constant fights between his parents. Will he return?

Title: Munna Michael
Description: India's first ever dance-action film starring Tiger Shroff as a street dancer who turns dance guru for a gangster, Mahindar, played by Nawazuddin Siddiqui!

Title: Singham Returns
Description: India's favourite supercop returns to wipe out crime and bring justice to the innocent, this time in Mumbai against a powerful villain.

Title: The Great Indian Butterfly
Description: In the quest of finding a magical insect in Goa, a couple embarks on a journey of love, happiness, and self-discovery.

Title: Dhoom Dadakka
Description: Mungilal finds himself in a confusing scenario as 4 individuals randomly show up when he seeks out the rightful heir.

Title: Mr. White Mr. Black
Description: Gopi is on a mission to fulfil his father's last wish. Little did he know that he's getting into a series of madcap situations!

Title: C/O Saira Banu
Description: Some relationships are beyond blood and family, such as a Muslim woman who shall move mountains to save her Christian son.

Title: A Monsoon Date
Description: A young woman decides to tell her date of a heartbreaking truth from her past. While she holds on to unreasonable hope, will he understand?

Title: Kidi
Description: Bhuvan's ill-temper lands him in a life and death situation when he takes on a gangster and his henchman. Will he manage to get out of this mess?

Title: Yehi Hai Zindagi
Description: The movies plot revolves around Anand Narayan who hails from a poor family, which consists of his wife, Gayatri, daughter, Kamla and two sons Madhu and Govind.

Title: Infected 2030
Description: The film is set in 2030, where the pandemic has affected 25 crore people all over the world. A happy couple's life changes after the wife contracts the virus and her husband struggles to find a hospital bed. Hence, she is quarantined. But after two months, she misses her husband’s physical presence and gradually begins to lose patience. Will the pandemic take a toll on their marital life?

Title: Vandi
Description: Three friends, struggling to survive in the city, find a bike, which unbeknownst to them is stolen, adding to their trouble. Will they be able to escape?

Title: Ottamuri Velicham
Description: A newly wed Sudha struggles to survive with her sexually violent husband and decides to fight for her freedom. But will she succeed?

Title: Trunk
Description: With a strong inhuman presence around him, Rahul sets out to fight the supernatural force. But will he succeed?

Title: Crack
Description: While investigating a challenging case, a cop figures the link to solve the case, only to find out that he has too much to lose.

Title: Halahal
Description: The Murder of a college girl faked as a suicide takes Dr. Shiv on a journey to dig the truth on his daughter’s death.

Title: Wedding Pullav
Description: Karan and Anushka are best friends. When Karan marries Riya, Anushka is going to marry Jay. Does fate have a twist in store for them?

Title: Mukkabaaz
Description: Life of an aspiring boxer springs into action when he falls hopelessly in love with a high caste, mute girl, who happens to be related to his arch enemy.

Title: Chandragiri
Description: Raghavan finds himself at a crossroads when he finds out about the school manager's ulterior agendas! Can he protect his school?

Title: Izzatdaar
Description: Brahmdutt, a rich steel baron is falsely convicted in the murder of his best friend and business partner Premchand. When in prison, Brahmdutt finds out from sources that his son-in-law Indrajeet was behind this.

Title: Aan
Description: When Shamsher kidnaps Mangala, Jai retaliates by abducting Rajshree, the haughty sister of Shamsher.

Title: Anokhi Ada
Description: During his vagabond days Surendra meets a girl and falls in love with her. She is poor and after the loss of her father and younger brother decides to leave the city. Surendra confesses his love but a train accident while they were travelling separates them and she loses her memory. Will Surendra be able to trace her and remind her of their love is what the rest of the story is about.

Title: Anmol Ghadi
Description: A maudlin musical saga, famous for some immortal, gilded era songs. The film also has its share of deep emotions and some interesting semiotics.

Title: Bewafai
Description: Asha loves Ashok & is very possessive about him. When she finds out that a girl name Renu is close to Ashok, she tries to teach her a lesson.

Title: Hey Ram
Description: A period drama told in flashback, the semi-fictional plot centers around India's Partition and the assassination of Mahatma Gandhi.

Title: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak
Description: Vighnaharta Shree Siddhivinayak is a film based on the real-life stories and of Shree Siddhivinayak experienced by devotees. Its a film about human values and beliefs.

Title: Toffee - Short Film
Description: They wrap toffees, they share ice-lollies and dance out of rhythm to loud numbers. Will destiny let them have their piece of childhood or take it away?

Title: Zindagi Virat
Description: A journey of a man who sets out to fulfil his father's last wish in this light-hearted drama that subtly underlines the importance of a father-son's relationship.

Title: The Attacks of 26-11
Description: The Attacks of 26/11 pays tribute to the real heroes who safeguarded Mumbai & its people during its darkest hours.

Title: Humein Tumse Pyar Ho Gaya Chupke Chupke
Description: Amidst the family drama, two childhood friends find love and must fight for their happy ending!

Title: Humayun
Description: The film follows an unlikely friendship between two men who fought on opposite sides of a sprawling, vicious battle that tore their country apart.

Title: Diary of a Butterfly
Description: Gul, an ambitious girl, goes to Mumbai to become successful by any means whatsoever, only to realise that all success comes at a price.

Title: Band Baaja Babuchak
Description: Four eligible bachelors are struggling to persuade a multi-millionaire daughter for marriage. But who will she pick?

Title: Mijaaj
Description: Three friends join hands to fight a local goon to save a lodge from being sold off, but will they succeed in their mission?

Title: Bobby
Description: Bobby gives up his seminary studies to marry a woman 7 years elder to him. They get married, but is it love or compromise?

Title: Meri Nimmo
Description: Follow the life of an 8-year-old Hemu who tries to win a much older Nimmo over in his own innocent ways.

Title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh
Description: A battle of good over evil ensues when a righteous cop sets out to rescue a village from the wrath of a cruel ruler.

Title: No Smoking
Description: K, a chain-smoker, visits a rehabilitation center to quit smoking. He is released after he signs a cheque for 21 lakh rupees and is warned that his family will be killed if he dares to smoke again.

Title: Aaj Ka Ravan
Description: When Shankar comes across evidence against a culprit, little does he know that he has opened a Pandoras Box that will put four lives in danger?

Title: Preethiya Raayabhari
Description: Ravi and Nandini's lives change forever after their romantic getaway turns into their scariest nightmare.

Title: Dhol Taashe
Description: A young man's passion for music lands him in trouble when his ideology begins to conflict with the political party leader who hired him.

Title: Asathoma Sadgamaya
Description: While Raghava and Sandhya want to move out to the United States, Sherlin wants to come back when their lives go upside down with Khushi's mysterious death.

Title: Paippin Chuvattile Pranayam
Description: Govutty and Teena are in love with each other, but their relationship faces too many obstacles. Will they be able to overcome these hurdles?

Title: Kelavu Dinagala Nanthara
Description: A group of friends take off on a mini-vacation but little do they know that an unwelcome surprise awaits them. Can the group of friends handle the surprise?

Title: Dunno Y... Na Jaane Kyon
Description: A story of two people who find their love outside the confines of societal norms. Will they break through the stigmas of society or cave in?

Title: Daal Mein Kuch Kaala Hai
Description: Daal Mein Kuch Kaala Hai is the humorous tale of a budding actress who must con a rich loser to become successful in Bollywood.

Title: Ra.One - Tamil
Description: A video game developer's world spirals out of control when his shape-shifting indestructible virtual creation becomes all too real.

Title: Aav Taru Kari Nakhu
Description: A widower decides to remarry making his sons panic! Watch them hilariously try to sabotage their father’s marriage in this out-and-out Gujarati comedy-drama, Aav Taru Kari Nakhu.

Title: Kulfi
Description: What happens when three unsuspecting men are tricked by a schizophrenic woman into accompanying her to her estate?

Title: Astitva
Description: When Aditi finds out she has been named the sole heir to the estate of an old acquaintance, her husband is puzzled and suspicious.

Title: Amar
Description: A well-respected lawyer, engaged to a socially-conscious young woman, has a moment of weakness that leaves an aftermath of guilt and heartbreak.

Title: Main Aur Mera Haathi
Description: Wrongly imprisoned for a crime he did not commit in his youth, Ram seeks vengeance against Teja. Will he succeed in it?

Title: Hota Hai Dil Pyaar Mein Paagal
Description: Two friends fight it out to win the hand of the girl they love - and they will pull all stops to win her heart!

Title: Andaz
Description: Suspecting that his wife is having a relationship with another man he decides to take drastic steps. Steps that will change the lives of the trio forever.

Title: Anari
Description: Poverty struck Raj and Poonam's love is put to test when Vikram, a well to do man comes in their lives! Will their love prevail?

Title: Hum Dil De Chuke Sanam
Description: Hum Dil De Chuke Sanam is Hindi romantic drama movie about Nandini (Aishwarya Rai Bachchan), Sameer (Salman Khan) and Vanraj (Ajay Devgn). Sameer while studying Indian Classical Music under Nandini's father Pundit Darbar, falls in love Nandini. Against this love union, Pundit Darbar fixes her marriage with Vanraj. Watch Hum Dil De Chuke Sanam to see how this marriage impacts the three lives!

Title: Aavuj Reshe
Description: Three good-for-nothing friends stumble upon an opportunity that changes their lives forever.

Title: Barayan
Description: Anirudh, a 12th standard student, juggles between day-to-day pressure, entrance tests, hostel fun, and friends.

Title: Riktha
Description: The ghost of a young boy sees an actress who resembles the girl he was in love with. Will the girl realise his presence around her?

Title: Dharasnan
Description: What happens when Tomosa's drive to achieve her career goals lands her in a complicated situation with another woman?

Title: Chaurahen-Crossroads
Description: Chaurahen - Crossroads is an evocative and poignant composition consisting of three separate stories set in three different cities in contemporary India. Each revolves around love, life, and loss.

Title: Chitthi
Description: A rib-tickling comedy where one misplaced love letter ends up creating havoc in the lives of two lovers, a gang of kids and a postmaster!

Title: Baban
Description: Baban (Bhausaheb Shinde), a college student from a small village is trying to run his milk business while balancing his studies & supporting his family. In an already complicated life, his nemesis Abhay keeps making things more difficult for him. Watch Baban, a Marathi tragic romance movie to see if an ambitious Baban will overcome all the obstacles that come in his way towards a prosperous life?

Title: Duniyadari
Description: Revisit the 70s with this tale of love where three people find themselves caught in the web of love, friendship and heartbreaks!

Title: 6ne Maili
Description: An engaging thriller that revolves around a group of trekkers, who go missing without a trace at the 6th mile of the trekking zone. When more such cases come to light, a Police investigation reveals the truth behind these disappearances. The mysterious thriller is brought to life with a bone-chilling soundtrack by Grammy-winning music studio, Metropolis.

Title: Bidrohini
Description: Bidrohini is a film that shows how an IPS officer who is also a sister, a daughter & wife seeks for justice, all alone.

Title: Soulmate
Description: In "Soulmate", Ada's unhealthy obsession with a married man, Abhishek, leads her to use black magic to switch bodies with his wife Kanika. Watch soulmates and find out what happens next.

Title: Anwar Ka Ajab Kissa
Description: This is a story of Anwar (Nawazuddin Siddiqui), a clumsy private detective who often gets stuck in hilariously troublesome situations because of his habit of getting involved in the personal lives of his cases. While his life is about following people, he is still in search of himself, and he finally gets a chance to face a tragedy in his past when he lands a case to find Amol (Pankaj Tripathi).

Title: Life of Josutty
Description: Life Of Josutty is the story of a man who after many trials and tribulations in his life manages to attain monumental success. But an unexpected epiphany leads him back to the straight and narrow path.

Title: Bhavesh Joshi Superhero
Description: An extraordinary story of an ordinary superhero who cannot fly or swing; but fights for justice by exposing corruption and unmasking the truth.

Title: Tamburo
Description: Two friends Hardik and Bhavik aspire to become rich quickly but become victims of their plans.

Title: Sex Education
Description: Sex Education is a film that highlights the importance of imparting sex education and normalizing it among the teenagers. It also aims at creating awareness about love, respecting your partners and their boundaries, STDs and much more.

Title: Suryansh
Description: An honest cop, Karan Rana, is on an investigation spree in the city when he discovers a crime syndicate. In a quest to find the truth, he digs deep to only find that everyone he trusts is involved in it. Watch Suryansh, a roller coaster ride of action, drama, mystery and betrayal.

Title: 2 Penkuttikal
Description: Two young women skip class to visit a mall. When their plans take an unexpected turn, their lives are changed forever.

Title: Oskar
Description: What happens when Ratul, along with the entire Achinpore Rajwadi community, sets out to make an Oscar-nominated movie?

Title: Abyakto
Description: Catch this award-winning tale on the life of Indra and his mother!

Title: Wass...up! Zindagi
Description: Bhavesh, Dharmesh, and Rehan set out on a journey that changes their lives forever.

Title: Kesari
Description: Kesari is a Marathi sports drama movie about Balram Jadhav, a young wrestler, whose only aim in life is to win The Maharashtra Kesari title! The film shows how Balram goes against his father's will who wants him to join his family business and how he continues to work towards his goal of winning the title. Watch Kesari to see if Balram will be successful in achieving his goals against all the odds.

Title: Devdas
Description: Devdas is a tragic Hindi movie about Devdas (Shahrukh Khan) who returns home after studying for 10 years in London. Devdas shared a special bond with Paro (Aishwarya Rai) & wanted to marry her. But his family refuses Devdas's marriage to Paro, which shatters him and he turns to alcohol for solace. Watch Devdas to know whether he will come out of alcoholism & get the love of his life?

Title: Dictator - Telugu
Description: When the lives of his loved ones are in peril, an affluent businessman takes on the identity of a commoner to fight evil.

Title: Chakradhaar
Description: The movie is set in Banaras in today's time of politics and corruption. Shravan is a simple but righteous son of a peon who joins Banaras University for his post graduation on his father's insistence.

Title: Kattu Kathe
Description: Kattu Kathe is a Kannada comedy thriller movie about Ram, who falls in love with Aadhaya and woos her without revealing that he has a hearing disability. When Aadhaya and her friends are abducted by a gang of murderers, Rajesh, a cop, steps in to solve the case. Watch Kattu Kathe to find out if Rajesh succeeds in rescuing them!

Title: Kaththi
Description: A criminal impersonating a social worker to escape the cops ends up fighting for his doppelganger’s mission to save a village from exploitation.

Title: Tamizhukku En Ondrai Azhuthavam
Description: A deadly bomb will be activated if a computer geek restores a city's mobile networks, which are down due to a solar flare.

Title: Gotya
Description: Gotya is a Marathi sports drama based on a school kid fascinated with playing marbles ever since his first game. While studying in school, a young Gotya wonders why the game of marbles is not listed in the Olympics. Watch Gotya seek out a journey to get his favourite game recognized as an official sport in India. With the odds set against him, will Gotya succeed in making his dream a reality?

Title: Provoked - Hindi
Description: A true story of an Indian woman incarcerated for murdering her abusive husband who had her conviction overturned in a case that changed British law.

Title: Posto
Description: A little boy is caught between two generations of parents as they battle the reasons to be his rightful guardians.

Title: Golmaal 3
Description: Cupid strikes when Pritam, a single father, comes across his college sweetheart, Geeta, in Goa. But with their respective children at war with each other, the two find it difficult to reunite.

Title: Ganagandharvan
Description: Ganagandharvan is a Malayalam comedy drama movie about Kalasadhan Ullas (Mammootty), an aspiring stage singer. The movie revolves around Ullas, his journey & fight towards becoming successful. In the process of achieving his goal, he comes across an opportunistic woman & father who conspire against him. Watch Ganagandharvan to see all the ups & downs Kalasadhan goes through in his life.

Title: Rajini Murugan
Description: Rajini Murugan, an unemployed youth, falls in love with Karthika, his cousin. But Karthika's father opposes the match.

Title: Praktan
Description: Praktan is a journey of memories and realization between two different women who meet on a train and gradually find out about each other’s lives.

Title: Boyz 2
Description: This Time Boyhood Turns to Adulthood..!! Sit back and Enjoy Boyz 2 Trailer. Movie starring Sumant Shinde, Parth Bhalerao and Pratik Lad. Movie Directed by Vishal Sakharam Devrukhkar.

Title: Darling
Description: Four depressed youngsters plan to kill themselves together but instead grow close and find a reason to live. That’s when a ghost enters the picture.

Title: Neerparavai
Description: Neerparavai is the twisted tale of a son discovering the emotional and literal skeletons in his lonely old mother’s life.

Title: Oru Yamandan Premakadha
Description: Oru Yamadan Premakadha is a Malayalam comedy-drama movie about Lallu and his friends looking for a missing girl, Diya.

Title: Welcome Back
Description: A pair of reformed gangsters try to find a husband for their sister they dot upon, but hilarious complications arise due to mistaken identities!

Title: Sardaar Gabbar Singh - Telugu
Description: A battle of good over evil ensues when a righteous cop sets out to rescue a village from the wrath of a cruel ruler.

Title: Julie
Description: A film about the restrictive social conventions regarding inter-caste marriage and unwed motherhood in India.

Title: Pension
Description: Here's a family of three — Balu, his mother, and grandmother. They survive on his grandfather's pension of rupees eight hundred a month. Once Balu starts going to school, the expenses increase and unfortunately, the grandmother falls ill. Find out how this family struggles to survive against all odds.

Title: That Man In The Picture
Description: The guilt of inaction haunts the man who witnesses a gruesome crime. What will he do next?

Title: Belaseshe
Description: When Biswanath Mazumdar announces his decision to divorce his wife after 49 years, he sends his large extended family into drama and turmoil.

Title: Saajan
Description: Sajaan is about Aman (Sanjay Dutt) & Akash (Salman Khan) who grew up together like brothers post Akash's father adopted Aman. Both with poles apart personalities, fall for the same girl - Pooja Saxena (Madhuri Dixit). Pooja happens to be Aman's poetry's fan & unknowingly falls for Akash, thinking he is the poet! Watch Saajan to know how their lives take a turn in this gut wrenching love triangle.

Title: Ab Hoga Dharna Unlimited
Description: Opposition neta Gopinath wants Baba Lakshman Dev to do dharna - and bring the government down. Will these plans get executed?

Title: Kaadan
Description: When man's greed takes over, the jungle rises for an epic war. Will good win over evil? The battle has just begun.

Title: Asehi Ekada Vhave
Description: In a bid to woo Kiran, a popular radio jockey, Siddharth offers her to be a part of his company's radio campaign but unexpected situations affect the fate of their budding relationship.

Title: Bubble Gum
Description: A coming-of-age story set in Jamshedpur, on the life of a teenager, no longer a kid, not yet an adult.

Title: Alifa
Description: Alifa and her family struggle with the hardships of the city life as they are forced to leave their village due to rampant floods and erosion.

Title: Conditions Apply
Description: Conditions Apply explores new age relationships and how everything is more about acceptance today rather than compromise. But is that all it takes to make a relationship work?

Title: Karaar
Description: Unable to conceive a child, a married couple turns to surrogacy but find themselves in a strange situation.

Title: Khajoor Pe Atke
Description: Devender Sharma fights for his life in the ICU while all his relatives come from across the country to see him, expecting the inevitable. Things turn hilarious when he neither dies nor gets better, leaving his relatives stuck with his wife and son.

Title: Kintu Galpo Noy
Description: Shikha and Deep meet at the Students Health Home while dealing with their respective illnesses and form a very special bond.

Title: Jojo
Description: Mrittika is assigned a bizarre task of babysitting an eerie-looking doll named Jojo. Will she be able to deal with it or will Jojo add yet another dark twist in her life?

Title: Commrade
Description: Nandini and Radharani against all odds take up the leadership of a movement for the farmers against the government over a land dispute!

Title: Pagalpanti
Description: A tourist group from India sets out on a vacation, only to have their trip turn into a patriotic mission. Will it end well for them?

Title: Madura Veeran
Description: Packed with action, suspense and a gripping climax is the story of a man who returns to India to marry, but his one true motive is darker than you think!

Title: Othello
Description: A rickshaw driver meets an escort at a police station and the two form a special bond soon but will it last long?

Title: Bedhadak
Description: Will the gifted and passionate boxer Ajay overcome the hurdles that come his way and be able to achieve his goal?

Title: Gavthi
Description: Gavthi is a Marathi romantic movie about a young village boy Gajanan (Shrikant Patil) - his rags to riches story and all the struggles he lives through. Success came with enormous sacrifices for Gajanan, who gave up everything, including his childhood love, to make it big in the city! Watch Gavthi to know how Gajanan became successful & whether he actually got over his childhood love!

Title: Bhagshesh
Description: A tale of unconditional love, Bhagshesh shows the bond between Madhumanti and her seven-year-old stepdaughter Pooja.

Title: Antareen
Description: Her quest to get her father’s love and attention lands Torali in a mental asylum. But will she find her way out?

Title: Pornomochi
Description: Trapped in a world of fantasy and pornography, will a teenaged boy find his way out of this addiction?

Title: Hoyto Manush Noy
Description: To make their cab ride home a little fun, 5 working professionals start telling spooky stories to each other, turning this into a ride they'll never forget.

Title: MO
Description: A Horror comedy where five people plan to spook a businessman to earn quick money, not realizing that the place is actually haunted!

Title: Juvva
Description: Rana, a conman, falls in love with a rich girl, Shruti. He soon learns that she is being chased by a criminal and tries to save her. Will he succeed?

Title: Kaya: The Mystery Unfolds
Description: Trapped in a remote location, will a filmmaker and his team escape the unseen and mysterious presence that looms over them?

Title: Yogi Duniya
Description: After an easy-going Yogi falls in love with Sheela, he finds out some shocking revelations about her. What happens next?

Title: Guha Manab - The Caveman
Description: What will Pinky do when she stumbles upon the mysterious caveman who she has been getting strange dreams of?

Title: Mithun
Description: Despite being together for a while, Mithun and Kanchi don't seem to be serious about their relationship. Will the two ever find love and commitment?

Title: Haanduk
Description: Despite having to deal with the loss of her only son, Heramoni attempts to lead a normal life in hopes of having her dreams fulfilled.

Title: Baranda
Description: Girija's insecurities take over his mind as he suspects that his partner Runu is falling in love with a paying guest.

Title: Dr. Tatya Lahane - Angaar..Power is within
Description: Watch the inspiring tale of Tatya Lahane who grew up to become a great eye doctor despite being born to a poor family.

Title: Shobdo Kolpo Droom
Description: When the city falls prey to terrorist activities, a bunch of special kids takes it on themselves to save the city. But will they succeed?

Title: Aranya
Description: In the chaos of the jungle, a war is brewing. Trumpets roar as the elephants prepare for battle. Man or nature, which side will you be on?

Title: Mera Punjab
Description: Mera Punjab is a 1994 Indian Punjabi film, directed and produced by Darshan Bagga. The film stars Shatrughan Sinha, Joginder Shelly, Guggu Gill, Daljit Kaur and Darshan Bagga in lead roles.

Title: Jo Dooba So Paar
Description: Keshu is hardly interested in the routine business of life. His life changes when he meets an Indian-Italian girl who is in India as part of her research.

Title: Hudugatada Hudugi
Description: Hudugatada Hudugi is a 1970 an Indian kannada film directed by Amrutham .The film stars Sampath, Shreenath and Sampath in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by M Ranga Rao.

Title: Server Somanna
Description: Server Somanna is 1993 an Indian kannada film directed by K.Vasu and produced by Hariprasad.The film stars Jaggesh, Rambha, Dwarakish and Abhijit in the lead roles.

Title: Giri Baale
Description: Giri Baale is a 1985 Indian Kannada film, directed by Dorai and Bhaghavaan. The film stars Jayamala, Rajkumar and Sampath in lead roles. The film had musical score by Rajan-Nagendra.

Title: Shivanna
Description: Shivanna is a 1993 an Indian kannada film directed by G.K.Mudduraaj and produced by Srinivas.The film stars Jaggesh, Ashalatha, Vani and PChiranjeevi in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by V.Manohar.

Title: Hettavala Koogu
Description: Hettavala Koogu is a 1996 an Indian kannada film directed by V.Umashankar and produced by K V Jaji.The film stars Abhijit, Sitara, Rajesh,Pramila Joshai and Bank Janardhan in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Vijaya Bhaskar.

Title: Miss Leelavathi
Description: Leelavathi is brought up by her father as a liberal and modern woman. This leads society to ridicule his parenting skills.

Title: Ganda Mane Makkulla
Description: Ganda Mane Makkulla is a 1988 Indian Kannada film, directed by T P Ganjendra and produced by Dwarakish. The film stars Dwarakish, Sudha Rani, Shreenath, Vaanishri and Vanitha Vaasu in lead roles. The film had musical score by Vijay Anand.

Title: Sedina Hakki
Description: Sedina Hakki is a 1985 an Indian kannada film directed by Bhaghavaan and Dorai and produced by Mohan Sharma.The film stars Ananth Nag, Lakshmi, Ramesh Bhat and Rajiv in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Rajan-Nagendra.

Title: Mummy Punjabi
Description: Mummy Punjabi' is the story of Baby, a new age urban Punjabi mother, who is an entertainer and knows how to strike a balance between tradition and progressive mind.

Title: Chowkada Deepa
Description: Chowkada Deepa is a 1969 Indian Kannada film, directed by G.V.Iyer. The film stars Pandharibai, Rajendra Kumar and Ananthrao Machere in lead roles.

Title: Golibar
Description: Golibar is 1993 an Indian kannada film directed by Shivamani and produced by Ramu The film stars Suresh Heblikar, Shweta and Vishaka in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Hamsalekha.

Title: Kadana
Description: Kadana is a 1991 an Indian Kannada film directed by K.V.Raju and produced by Venu Gopal.The film stars Ramakrishna, Devaraj and Sangeetha in the lead roles.

Title: International Hero
Description: Struggling to avoid communal rights between the Hindu and Muslims, what will a righteous Muslim man do?

Title: Ek Adbhut Dakshina - Guru Dakshina
Description: An orphaned boy Dev is adopted by Guruji and brought to his dance academy in Kolkata. Dev falls for Guruji's daughter, Sanjukta, but she finds herself seduced by Chhau dancer Gambhira instead, who seems like a man of dubious intent. He not only ruins Sanjukta's life but also his Guruji’s. Will Dev come to help them?

Title: The Revenge - Geeta Mera Naam
Description: When her father is killed by his rival political leader, Geeta sets out to avenge his death in this high-octane action drama starring Dharmendra.

Title: Broker Bheeshmachari
Description: Broker Bheeshmachari is a 1969 Indian Kannada film, directed by B C Srinivas. The film stars Rajesh, Jayanthi, Shailshri and Narasimharaju in lead roles. The film had musical score by Vasanth Kumar.

Title: Jeevana Jyothi
Description: Jeevana Jyothi is a 1987 an Indian Kannada film directed by P. Vasu. The film stars Vishnuwardan, Ambika and Nalini in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Vijay Anand.

Title: Entea Naadu
Description: Entea Naadud is a 1984 Indian Malayalam film directed by Rajesh Touchriver and produced by Sunitha krishnan. The film stars Mammootty, Roja & Aishwarya in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Sharreth.

Title: Kiss Kis Ko
Description: The boys discover one essential truth that to be a band they must forge a bond.

Title: Hashar - A Love Story
Description: In a university, politicians, for their own benefit, influence student politics which takes an ugly turn and creates havoc in the personal life of students.

Title: Jeene Nahin Doongi
Description: Badal falls in love with a woman who agrees to marry him on a condition that leaves him in a life-shattering situation. What did she ask for?

Title: Humne Jeena Seekh Liya
Description: A group of teenage school boys gather in their beloved 'adda' to deliberate on the every day of school-life... and learn valuable lessons on the way.

Title: U Me Aur Hum
Description: Ajay and Pia's world comes crashing down when Pia is diagnosed with Alzheimer's disease. But the two don't give up in the worse of times.

Title: Kanoon Ki Awaaz
Description: The film revolves around Darshall Lall, who is a gangster with many political connections. And it is for this reason that no police officer has dared to arrest Lall or any of his men.

Title: Khoobsurat
Description: In order to get money, Sanju a con-man decides to pose as a member of the Shastri family to gain their wealth, but fate has something else in store.

Title: Last Chance
Description: The film is based on a woman's revenge who is now taking revenge on another character.

Title: Azhagiya Tamilmagan
Description: Guru Moorthy is a business management student who is love with Abhinaya- the daughter of a business baron. When he sees a vision of he himself killing Abhi; Guru must figure out why he does so.

Title: Aga Bai Arechyaa 2
Description: A love story blooms between a writer and a woman whose touch can kill the person she loves!

Title: Prahaar
Description: An idealistic and patriotic army officer is shocked to see that the country he has fought for is going to the dogs.

Title: Tum Ho Yaara
Description: Shiva chooses to stay away from his love Meera and go to the US to get a job. There he meets with an accident and loses his memory.

Title: Srimanthudu - Telugu
Description: A father and son stand the test of time to fight for truth and justice.

Title: Sellvandhan
Description: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multi-millionaire, Ravikant. A chance meeting with Charusheela leads Harsha to a remote village, which he wishes to adopt and develop.

Title: 18.11 - A Code of Secrecy
Description: A software engineer is arrested for allegedly planting bombs in Mumbai, Kashmir and Guwahati.

Title: Agni Devi
Description: A cop runs up against political corruption while investigating the murder of a journalist.

Title: Dictator - Yudh Ek Jung
Description: When the lives of his loved ones are in peril, an affluent businessman takes on the identity of a commoner to fight evil.

Title: Once More
Description: Once More is a Marathi movie about Kapil, an archaeologist, who's unhappily married to Anjali. When he finds a possibly magical dagger, he visits to Avadhpuri to find out more. Anjali is also visiting her grandfather who lives in Avadhpuri. When Kapil and Anjali are reunited in the town, strange things happen which are tied to a secretive, ancient past. What happens when this secret comes to light?

Title: Hatyari
Description: Hatyari is a 2000 Hindi film, directed by Rakesh. The film stars Dinesh Hingoo, Rakesh Bedi, Ram Mohan, Sadashiv Amrapurkar in lead roles.

Title: Bajirao Mastani - Telugu
Description: An epic love story between a ferocious Maratha general, Bajirao and his second wife Mastani, a warrior princess who struggle to make their love triumph amid opposition from his conservative family.

Title: Chaahat – Ek Nasha
Description: Mallika (Manisha Koirala) loves Rahul Kapoor (Aryan Vaid), her friend and collaborator, but refuses to marry him. As they grow distant, he develops feelings for Rashmi (Preeti Jhangiani), and soon launches her debut album. This irks Mallika and she wants him dead. Will her bodyguard — Jaidev — murder Rahul? Or does better sense prevail in the end? Find out in Chaahat – Ek Nasha.

Title: I Dont Luv U
Description: The film focuses on the youth of today who are extremely casual in their relationships and do not want to delve into the intricacies of commitments.

Title: Ishq Ke Parindey
Description: For Sheen and Faiz, love surpassed all borders. But can they protect the flame of their sacred love from hatred and violence? Ishq Ke Parindey portrays the Indo-Pak conflict against the backdrop of a love story and bears a message of peace.

Title: Maunn
Description: What happens when a shocking revelation compels a couple to face a horrifying truth but are unable to confront the perpetrator?

Title: Short Circuit
Description: Short Circuit is a Gujarati movie about Samay, who falls in love with Seema, a TV anchor. Seema interviews a scientist and discovers his dangerous experiments. The scientist threatens her to not interfere with his research. But Samay gets unwittingly trapped in the scientist's evil plan. Can he save Seema and uncover the mystery behind this scheme? Watch Short Circuit to find out.

Title: Kuasha Jakhon
Description: A first of its kind paranormal romance for Bengali cinema that brings a spiritual story of timeless love to life.

Title: Boxer
Description: Boxer is a Bengali sports drama movie about a young boxer Rony (Shikhar Srivastava) who realises that life is a lot like the boxing ring... where defeat is not declared when you fall down but when you choose to give up. Watch Boxer to know whether Ronny gets knocked out or emerges a champion.

Title: Meri Khoj Mere Haath - Short Film
Description: An inspiring story of self-discovery when a clueless, young woman realizes her dreams and aspirations.

Title: Thanneer Mathan Dinangal
Description: Thanneer Mathan Dinangal follows the life of a sceptical yet honest eleventh-grade student, Jaison. The boy has a huge crush on Keerthy, his classmate but unfortunately, she does not reciprocate his feelings. Matters worsen when their new Malayalam teacher — Ravi Padmanabhan — becomes the centre of attraction. Ravi's influence on everyone irritates Jaison and he openly complains about Ravi being a fraud. As the film progresses, Ravi's true identity is revealed while Keerthy and Jaison fall in love. Experience the mischievousness during school days, teen angst, and a whole lot more in this coming-of-age drama.

Title: Anta Fazila
Description: Anta Fazila is a Hindi horror drama starring Bhavesh Koriya and Kavya Chauhan in prominent roles. The movie also stars Sajid Hussain.

Title: Jamun
Description: Jamun is a Hindi movie about a father trying to find a groom for his daughter who is squinted. In this process, he is diagnosed with Parkinson’s disease. Watch Jamun to find out if he gets his daughter married.

Title: Nannha Farishta
Description: Three burglars have to kidnap a young infant. But things don't go as per plan, as the kid falls sick and needs urgent medical attention.

Title: Dharm Adhikari
Description: Dharamaraj hides a secret which will destroy his status and position in society, alientaing his family completely. Dharamraj is a much loved king in Nandgaon, an territory he has inherited from his ancestors. But Chowdhary and Shastry of the village are jealous of him.

Title: Mother India
Description: An epic blockbuster of a brave woman who raises her sons through many trials and tribulations, but no matter the struggles, always sticks to her own moral code.

Title: Chauhar
Description: Based on a true story, Chauhar explores the reality of casteism when an upper caste girl, falls for a Dalit activist.

Title: Office #thebrightesthorrorfilm
Description: The story of the Office explores the basic idea of ghosts. It is a psychological horror that showcases how office employees get scared when they start seeing the ghost of a girl.

Title: Kabab Mein Haddi
Description: London-based Takila wants to marry a Punjabi girl but gets caught in a web of income tax raids, cops and two other girls vying for his affection.

Title: Kuch Kuch Locha Hai
Description: A rich Gujarati businessman Praveenbhai lies about his marital status when he meets Shanaya, a beautiful Bollywood debutante.

Title: Khatre Da Ghuggu
Description: Khatre Da Ghuggu is a Punjabi movie reloving around Fateh (Jordan Sandhu), an Rj who falls in love with Meet. But their love story takes an unusual turn when an astrologer predicts the early death of Meet's father Kanwar Mahinder Singh. Terrified, he does everything he can to avoid it which leads to comic situations. Watch Khatre Da Ghuggu to see all the things Singh does to avoid his early death.

Title: Pareshaan Parinda
Description: Neel's life gets complicated when he gets up with a random stranger in bed not recollecting how he got there!

Title: Ram Aur Shyam
Description: Ram and Shyam look very much alike yet are completely different in temperament and outlook. Ram is a quiet person while Shyam is lively, full of fun, and lives in constant fear of his wealth.

Title: Life is Beautiful
Description: A greed for Canadian residency forces Raj to marry Pia. They live together and there comes a twist when Linda enters into Raj's life.

Title: Koyelaanchal
Description: Koyelaanchal is the story of Saryu Bhan Singh, a ruthless Mafioso and Nisheeth Kumar, an upright District Collector who face off in a most unusual way.

Title: Vantas
Description: In search of her childhood friend, Gauri reaches a small town and seeks help from an undisciplined guy, Ambya, who's in love with her. Will the two find her friend?

Title: Borof
Description: Borof is the story of Subham Biswas a deft mountain climber who goes missing on his dream expedition to climb Everest. His loss creates a void in the lives of his wife Mrittika & his mother. While Mrittika has come to terms with the tragic fact, Subham's mother is unable to move on. The cold tale between the two women & their efforts to overcome their anguish is the essence of the film.

Title: Sab Kushal Mangal
Description: Sab Kushal Mangal is a romantic comedy movie about Pappu Mishra, creator & host of a Reality TV show, Mandira, a middle-class girl & Baba Bhandari, a corrupt Politician. This Hindi movie shows a series of humourous events that take place between Pappu & Baba trying to take revenge on each other, while falling for Mandira in the process. Watch Sab Kushal Mangal to see who Mandira finally chooses!

Title: Lajja
Description: A pregnant woman witnesses atrocities committed on women around the country while on a run from her husband.

Title: Unkahee
Description: Watch Unkahee – An Original Crime Thriller, join 6 murder suspects on their search to find the real killer amongst them. Watch the lives of these seemingly regular people change forever when they are pinned in a room and asked to find the serial killer hiding amongst them within 12 hours or face certain death. Will they be able to do what Delhi Police has been trying for the last 12 months?

Title: Bhuban Majhi
Description: Bhuban Majhi a wartime romance movie spanning four decades simultaneously from 1970 to 2013. Bhuban Majhi depicts the rebel within a common man, played by Parambrata Chatterjee. Nahir struggles to cope with the ongoing countrywide turmoil for independence. As a patriot, Nahir wants to take part in this war for independence, but the artist in him wants to attain freedom in a peaceful manner.

Title: Bawri Chhori
Description: Bawri Chhori is a Hindi drama movie of Radhika whose husband leaves her & goes away to London. Radhika waits for her husband to return, but her wait turns into frustration & she decides to go to London to take revenge. What follows next is a journey where she meets people who try to persuade & dissuade her from her path. Watch Bawri Chhori to know if she's able to take revenge from her husband.

Title: Haathi Mere Saathi
Description: Orphaned Raju lives with four elephants and loves them. The problem arises when Raju falls in love with Tanu.

Title: Villu
Description: A plainclothes police officer feigns romance with a woman to catch notorious gangsters.

Title: Chitkabrey - Shades Of Grey
Description: A story about seven couples who are brought together by chance once again, who will have to now face each other's interlinked past, present and future.

Title: Aur Pyar Ho Gaya
Description: Two childhood friends plan to get their children married; little do they know that one friend's daughter is already in love with someone else.

Title: Khota Sikka Jaat Ke Thaat
Description: A small-town boy meets the love of his life but their families are at war with each other. They must hatch a plan to bring their families together.

Title: Daag
Description: To escape the cruelties around him, a young sculptor becomes addicted to alcohol. He later tries to quit, but will society accept him?

Title: Sapne Saajan Ke
Description: As a couple falls helplessly in love with one another, they feel the need to lie about their wealth and status.

Title: Dhanwaan
Description: Anju gets the shock of her life when she goes back to meet Kashi, as she learns that he is deeply in love with another girl, Imli.

Title: Soulsathi
Description: Preeti is looking for her soulmate. But all the men she meets can only see her body. No one can see her soul.

Title: Na Jaane Kabse
Description: Karan Bajaj, a bartender turned resort developer, is the King of Tragedies. He is ditched at the altar by his fiance for the third time, and to save face he claims that she was not good enough for him. What happens next?

Title: Ashok Chakra - Tribute To Real Heroes
Description: Based on the true story of the 26/11 terror attack, this movie is a tribute to all the martyrs who lost fighting for the freedom of innocent lives.

Title: August 25 - Short Film
Description: A twisted tale of time, where two strangers strike up a conversation in a cab that shall rewrite their destinies.

Title: Zindagi-1976
Description: An old married couple gets separated in their twilight years due to their son's mistreatment. Its their daughter who will take an extreme step to teach her brothers a lesson and bring back her parents together.

Title: Vidhata - Tere Khel Hain Nirale
Description: Vidhata Tere Khel Hain Nirale is a story of three youngsters who must face destiny, fate and God to find their true love for each other.

Title: Patli Re Patli
Description: Patli Re Patli is a 1990 Indian Marathi film, directed by Vinay Lad and produced by Sudhakar Bokade. The film stars Laxmikant Berde, Varsha Usgaonkar, Suryakant and Neelu Phule in lead roles. The film had musical score by Anil Mohile.

Title: Paagalpan
Description: Th story revolves around two lovers Sameer and Roma, who face opposition from the wealthy father of the boy and the over-protective brothers of the girl. Matters take a turn for the worse when one of Sameer's fathers ships sinks, killing people from Roma's hometown.

Title: Chorni
Description: With the thought of saving a life, Judge Sinha decides to adopt a petty thief only to come face-to-face with her contentious past.

Title: Zindagi Aur Maut
Description: Spy thriller featuring two security agents, who put their lives in jeopardy for a secret mission that’ll drive you to the edge of your seats!

Title: New Delhi
Description: New Delhi is about a Delhi-based journalist who is imprisoned in a mental asylum after exposing the wicked side of two corrupted politicians.

Title: Brishti Tomake Dilam
Description: Brishti Tomake Dilam is a psychological bengali thriller film about a woman who has psychological impact on her sub-conscious which involves her in a murder conspiracy and investigation.

Title: Dotara
Description: Dotara is an action drama Bengali film about a regional movement turned anti-national militant where a journalist, decides to find the truth & eventually realises the brittle nature of it.

Title: An Eros Now Original Series
Description: Drugs, mafia, power and greed! Smoke, an Eros Now Original series explores the dark underbelly of Goa you breathe but never see.

Title: Elan
Description: Javed and Nazparvar are left heartbroken, when his widowed sister suggests that he is not the right match. Years later when they meet, Javed is a lawyer and she is accussed of killing her husband.

Title: Masss
Description: After a life-threatening accident, a man finds that he can communicate with the dead, and must decide whether to act on their advice.

Title: An Eros Now Original Series
Description: Come witness the journey of a common man which will truly inspire you.

Title: Rakshasudu
Description: After a life-threatening accident, a man finds that he can communicate with the dead, and must decide whether to act on their advice.

Title: An Eros Now Original Series
Description: Side Hero is about Kunaal Roy Kapur's struggles and his endeavours to change his life and become a star. Among all this chaos, he finds solace in his ex-wife (Gauahar Khan) and his son. From flirty co-actors to opportunist managers and failed producers, this hilarious comedy has all the elements of a Bollywood production.
