Kunaal plays a fictional version of his real self and each day he tries to find a shortcut to fame.

Title: An Eros Now Original Series
Description: Out of character. Out of rhythm. Out of order. The FLIP in each story will flip your mind. Can you predict the twist?
Aravind is convinced that his girlfriend was with him in an accident but no signs of her exist. He must investigate her disappearance or question his sanity.

Title: Gouravam
Description: Arjun and Shanmugam are two rich kids who must face the dark truth when they investigate their friends’ disappearance from a village.

Title: Paradesi
Description: Before independence during the 1940's depicts the lives of poor carefree villagers who are lured to work in Tea plantation farms and how they are forced to live rest of their lives as slaves with no traces of hope and freedom.

Title: Nagaraja Cholan MA, MLA
Description: The story is all about how Nagaraja Cholan MA, a cunning MLA becomes deputy CM and then CM using his crooked mind.

Title: Shubh Mangal Zyada Saavdhan
Description: #100%PrakritikPyaar coming your way, Valentine's 2020.

Title: Laal Kaptaan
Description: Har Ram Ka Apna Raavan, Har Ram Ka Apna Dussehra. Presenting Saif Ali Khan in and as Laal Kaptaan. Directed by Navdeep Singh, the hunt will begin on the 11th October 2019.

Title: Gone Kesh
Description: Diagnosed with Alopecia, what will a young woman do after her condition begins to hamper her ambitions and wreak havoc in her life?

Title: An Eros Now Quickie
Description: Story of Sheela, who overcomes all issues in life to become a comedian. A story laced with humour and funny performances.

Title: Kadvi Hawa
Description: Award winning director, Nila Madhab Panda brings us a story, that is too close for comfort.

Title: Aagadu
Description: A tough cop is transferred to a small town which is ruled by a rowdy-sheeter and business man Dhamu. The cop vows to take him down.

Title: Olappeeppi
Description: Olappeeppi portrays the story of an ordinary Malayali family and the changes in the socio-economic scene in Kerala from 1970's to the 2000's .

Title: Ghayal Once Again
Description: Ajay Mehra, after finishing his life sentence, starts a newspaper and makes a credible name for himself in investigative journalism.

Title: Enga Oru Pattukaran
Description: Enga Oru Pattukaran is a 1987 Indian Tamil film, directed by Gangai Amaran and produced by Kalyani Murugan. The film stars Ramarajan, Rekha, Shantipriya and Senthamarai in lead roles. The film had musical score by Ilaiyaraaja.

Title: Aranyakanda
Description: Aranyakanda is a 1986 Telugu action thriller, directed by Kranthi Kumar produced by C. Penchal Reddy. The film stars Akkineni Nagarjuna, Ashwini and Rajendra Prasad in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Chakravarthy.

Title: Maha Manishi
Description: Maha Manishi is a 1985 Indian Telugu film, directed by M. Balaiah and produced by U. Suryanarayana Babu. The film stars Krishna, Jayaprada and Radha in lead roles. The film had musical score by J. V. Raghavulu.

Title: Indrajeet (Sati Sulochana)
Description: Indrajeet (Sati Sulochana) is a 1961 Indian Telugu film, directed by S. Rajinikanth and Produced by S. Rajinikanth, D. V. Surya Rao and Kancharla Madhava Rao. The film stars N. T. Rama Rao, Anjali Devi, S. V. Ranga Rao, Kanta Rao and Chittor V. Nagaiah in lead roles. The music of the film was composed by T. V. Raju.

Title: Theendum Inbam
Description: Theendum Inbam is a 1997 Indian Tamil film, directed by Basu Bhattacharya and starring Rekha, Om Puri, Navin Nischol, Dinesh Thakur and Daisy Irani in lead roles.

Title: Vidiyum Varai Kaathiru
Description: Vidiyum Varai Kaathiru is a 1981 Indian Tamil film, directed by K. Bhagyaraj and produced by S. Sakthivela and M. S. Akbar. The film stars Bhagyaraj, Gokulnath, Sathyakala, Sangili Murugan and Karathe R.V.T. Mani in lead roles. The film had musical score by Ilaiyaraaja.

Title: Jagame Maaya
Description: Jagame Maaya is a 1973 Indian Telugu film, directed by I. N. Murthy and produced by P. V. Subba Rao. The film stars Murali Mohan and Vijaya Lalitha in lead roles.The film had musical score by Satyam.

Title: Kelviyum Naane Bathilum Naane
Description: Usha commits suicide when her piano teacher, Nirmal rejects her love. Her mother, Sathya Devi sets out to seek her revenge against him. She later, learns that Usha is not her daughter.

Title: Selvam
Description: Selvam 1966 Indian Tamil Movie directed by K. S. Gopalakrishnan. Produced by. V. K. Ramaswamy Star Cast Sivaji Ganesan, K. R. Vijaya, S. V. Ranga Rao and S. V. Sahasranamam in lead roles. The film had music by K. V. Mahadevan.

Title: Bhale Huduga
Description: Bhale Huduga is a 1978 Indian Kannada film, directed by T. R. Ramanna and produced by R. Ganesh. The film stars Vishnuvardhan, Manjula, Dwarakish and Udaykumar in lead roles. The film had musical score by G. K. Venkatesh.

Title: Idhu Thaada Needhi
Description: Idhu Thaada Needhi is a 1984 Indian Tamil film, directed by KM Purushothaman. The film stars V S Raghavan, Sujatha in lead roles. The film had musical score by Dr. Shankar Ganesh.

Title: Pudhalvan
Description: Pudhalvan is a 1997 Tamil crime film directed by Selva Vinayagam. The film features Ramki and Pragathi in lead roles, with Vijayakumar, Jayanthi, newcomer Raghavi, Mohan Natarajan, S. N. Vasanth and Raja Raveendar playing supporting roles. The film has musical score by Deva.

Title: Vasantham Vanthachu
Description: Fate makes a man, who has vowed to remain a bachelor throughout his life to take care of his ailing father, meet a woman. Unexpected developments follow, which change his life.

Title: Parijatham
Description: Parijathamis a 1950 Indian Tamil film, directed and produced by Shekhar. The film stars T.R.Mahalingam, M.V.Rajamma and B.S.Sarojan lead roles. The film had musical score by S.Venkatraman.

Title: Vijrumbhana
Description: Arun Kumar’s father was falsely accused of a murder and hung to death and his mother disappears never to return. Vijrumbhana, as the title itself suggests is about the aggressive behaviour of Arun Kumar who grows up to become a famous lawyer to avenge his parents.

Title: Pappu
Description: Pappu is a 1980 Indian Malayalam film, directed by Baby and produced by Raghu Kumar. The film stars Prathap Pothen, Seema, Sukumari and Jagathy Sreekumar in lead roles. The film had musical score by K. J. Joy.

Title: Tilak
Description: Tilak is a 2006 Indian Telugu film, directed by Sarath Kumar and Produced by Radhika Sarath Kumar and Radaan Media Works. The film stars Sarath Kumar, Nayanthara, Seema Biswas, Vadivelu, Mukesh Tiwari and Vijayakumar in lead roles. The film had musical score by Srikanth Deva.

Title: Ungal Anbu Thangachi
Description: Ungal Anbu Thangachi is a 1994 Indian Tamil film, directed by Jackob Freez and produced by T Motcham Fernando. The film stars Raja, Kirtana, Ravindar, Jaya Bharti.

Title: Pookalai Pareekatheergal
Description: Pookalai Pareekatheergal is a 1986 Indian Tamil film, directed by Alagappan and produced by Mangaadu Amman Films. The film stars Suresh, Nadiya, N. Mohan, Rajiv, S. S. Chandran and Senthil in lead roles. The music of the film was composed by T. Rajender.

Title: Vazhkai Chakkaram
Description: Thangavelu dearly loves his fiance, Kalyani. Her father, however, threatens to stop the marriage over dowry issues. Thangavelu somehow convinces him but another tragedy strikes on the marriage day.

Title: Vadakkunokki Yantram
Description: The movie is a humorous take on a marital discord caused by the husband's inferiority complex.It gives out the message that, like a Vadakkun Nokki Yanthram(Compass) one should not be unidirectional.

Title: Prema Chakram
Description: Prema Chakram is a 1996 Indian Telugu film, directed by Indhunaathan and produced by G Balasubrahmanyam. The film stars Nishanth, Payal and Illavarasu in lead roles. The film had musical score by Arabin Yusuf.

Title: Nene Monaganni
Description: Nene Monaganni is a 1968 Indian Telugu film, directed and produced by SD Lal. The film stars Sheela, Santha Kumari, Sandhya Rani and Dulipal in lead roles. The film had musical score by TV Raju.

Title: Balaraju
Description: Ardharatri Swatantram is a 1948 Telugu film, directed and produced by Ghantasala Balaramayya. The film stars Akkineni Nageswara Rao, Anjali Devi and Varalakshmi in lead roles.

Title: Manamagale Vaa
Description: Manamagale Vaa is a 1988 Indian Tamil film, directed by Panchu Arunachalam and produced by BH Rajannah. The film stars Prabhu, Radhika Sarathkumar, Goundamani and Chinni Jayanth in lead roles. The music of the film was composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

Title: Karumpuli
Description: When a gang of young men embarks on a journey to unleash terror, it turns into a race against time for all those involved.

Title: Priyamudan Prabhu
Description: Priyamudan Prabhu is a 1984 Indian Tamil film, directed by P. A.Gangaikondan and produced by P. L. Mohanram. The film stars Prabhu and Brindha in lead roles. The film had musical score by Ilayaraja.

Title: Aakrosham
Description: Aakrosham is a 1982 Indian Malayalam film, directed and produced by AB Raj. The film stars Prem Nazir, Srividya, Mohanlal and Rajalakshmi in lead roles. The film had musical score by Ben Surendar

Title: Kourava Samrajyam
Description: Madhu and Lata are in deep love with each other.Lata is the daughter of a low-caste tribal and Madhu is the son of the high caste family.Their love is being supported by Chandra Mohan.But Madhu's father doesn't want a low caste girl to become his daughter - in - law.So he plans and sends his son to the city to study and tries to harass Lata.But at the right time, the people of the village gain their senses and starts their fight against the cruel rulers of the village.

Title: Manishiki Maro Peru
Description: Manishiki Maro Peru 1983 Indian Telugu Movie directed by B. Padmanabham Produced by Mohan Babu film Stars Cast Krishna, Harinath, Jamuna, in lead roles. The film had musical score by P. Adinarayana Rao.

Title: Vilayada Vaa
Description: Vilayada Vaa is a 2012 Indian Tamil film, directed by Vijaya Nanda and produced by Leelakesavan. The film stars Viswanath Balaji, Ponvannan, Divya Padmini, Livingston and Manobala lead roles. The film had musical score by Sri Murali.

Title: Moodu Mulla Bandham
Description: Radha is a simple girl who believes in the institution of marriage. Her life changes completely when the man she is about to marry dies in an accident. Moreover, everyone blames it on her misfortune.

Title: Devadasu
Description: Devadasu is a 1953 Indian Telugu film, directed by Vedantam Raghavaiah and produced by D. L. Narayana. The film stars Akkineni Nageswara Rao, Savitri, Lalitha and S. V. Ranga Rao in lead roles. Music of the film was composed by C. R. Subburaman.

Title: Manasse Ninakku Mangalam
Description: Ravindra Menon, accidentally meets a widow, Rajani, and falls in love with her. But, Rajani, who refuses to love him, dies unexpectedly, leaving behind her daughter, Usha, whom Ravindra Menon adopts.

Title: Raktham Chhndhina Rathri
Description: Raktham Chhndhina Rathri is a 1993 Indian Telugu film, directed by Viji Thamp and produced by G. Madhu Kumar. The film stars Suresh Gopi, Ranjini, Jairam and Rehman in lead roles

Title: Idhu Konjam Pudhusu
Description: Idhu Konjam Pudhusu is a 2005 Indian Tamil movie directed by M.S.Guptha and produced by M. K. Saimohan. The film stars Abhinaya Sri, M.S.Guptha, Anu, Keerthana, in lead roles. The film had musical score by Rajkumar.

Title: Antharangam
Description: Antharangam is a 2010 Indian Tamil film, directed by Aruna Raje and produced by K.S.Elangovan. The film stars Manisha Koirala, Karan Nath, Rajath Kapoor, Natanya Singh and Aman Varma in lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

Title: Puthisaligal
Description: Puthisaligal is a family drama Tamil retro movie directed by T.P.Arjun starring, Chandra Babu, T.R.Ramachandran, K.A. Thangavelu and others.

Title: Dhamayanthi Varugiraal
Description: Dhamayanthi Varugiraal' is a 2014 Indian Hindi film, directed by Benny P Thomas and produced by Benny P Thomas.The film stars Uresh Krishna & Vani Viswanath in lead roles.

Title: Katha Nayagan
Description: Katha Nayagan is a 1988 Indian Tamil film, directed by Muktha Srinivasan and produced by Muktha Ramaswamy. The film stars Pandiarajan, S. V. Sekher, Rekha and Manorama in lead roles. The film had musical score by Chandra Bose.

Title: Doctor Bhavani
Description: Doctor Bhavani is a 1990 Indian Telugu film, directed by Y Nageswara Rao and produced by Jagadish Satyendra Kumar Reddy. The film stars Sharada, Bhanu Chander, Sai Kumar. in lead roles. The film had musical score by K Chakravarthy.

Title: Aalaya Deepam
Description: Aalaya Deepam is a 1984 Indian Tamil film, directed by C. V. Sridhar and Produced by K. R. Gangadharan. The film stars Rajesh, Sujatha, Suresh, Ilavarasi, Jaishankar and Vanitha in lead roles. The music of the film was composed by M.S. Viswanathan.

Title: Neethiyin Marupakkam
Description: Neethiyin Marupakkam is a 1985 Indian Tamil film directed by S. A. Chandrasekhar and produced by Shoba Chandrasekhar. The film features Vijayakanth, Radhika, Vadivukkarasi and V. K. Ramasamy in lead roles. The film, had musical score by Ilaiyaraaja.

Title: Sri Manthralaya Raghavendra Swamy Mahatyam
Description: Sri Manthralaya Raghavendra Swamy Mahatyam is a 1986 Indian Telugu film, directed by SP Muthuraman and Produced by G Prasad. The film stars Rajinikanth, Vishnuvardhan, JV Somayajulu, Lakshmi, KR Vijaya in lead roles. The film had musical score by Ilaiyaraaja.

Title: Kadaikan Parvai
Description: Kadaikan Parvai is a 1986 Indian Tamil film, directed by Rajsridhar and Produced by J. Rajamani Jayabal and J. Niruparani. The film stars Sathyaraj, Ilavarasi And Pandiyan in lead roles. The music of the film was composed by V.S. Narasimhan.

Title: Baghdad Perazhagi
Description: While Prince Abdullah is away for higher education, his father, King Hussein, falls for a dancer. Upon his return he finds that his mother and sister have disappeared and sets out to find them.

Title: Rajakumaaran
Description: Rajakumar hails from a respected family. He and his aunt's daughter Vaidhehi love each other. Selvi, the daughter of his other aunt, also loves him. However, Vaidhehi dies leaving him heart-broken.

Title: Kasauti
Description: Love blooms and so does trouble for Amit, a local taxi driver, when he falls in love with the girl he rescues from a smuggler.

Title: Pudhu Yugam
Description: Pudhu Yugam is a 1985 Indian Tamil film, directed by S A Chandrasekhar and produced by Shoba Chandrasekhar. The film stars Sivakumar, Vijayakanth, K. R. Vijaya and Suresh in lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Gangai Amaran.

Title: Chinna Veedu
Description: A young man dreams of marrying a beautiful girl. But, due to pressure from his father, he ends up with a Plain Jane. Then, he meets a gorgeous woman who, unbeknownst to him, is only behind his money.

Title: Iravin Madiyil
Description: Iravin Madiyil is a 2016 Indian Tamil film directed by V Bashkar and produced by V.S.Baskaran. The fim stars Vijay Adithiya, Nisha, Saravanan and Asha in the lead roles.

Title: Poojaikku Vantha Malar
Description: Suresh and Ravi are intimate friends, who study in the same college. But their friendship runs into trouble when both happen to work for the same company with different grades.

Title: Aa Roju
Description: Aa Roju is 2006 Telugu Horror flick directed by Civer Naga and produced by Viswaprasad with Ravi, Shiva and Priya in the main lead.

Title: Roopayi Raja
Description: Roopayi Raja is a 1994 Indian Kannada movie directed by B Mallesh and produced by S A Chinne Gowda and S A Srinivas. The film stars Jaggesh, Abhijith and Shruthi in lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Hamsalekha.

Title: Palleturi Monagadu
Description: Palleturi Monagadu is a 1983 Indian Telugu film, directed by S. A. Chandrasekhar and produced by Midde Rama Rao. The film stars Chiranjeevi, Raadhika and Poornima in lead roles. The film had musical score by K. Chakravarthy.

Title: Aniyan Bhava Chettan Bhava
Description: Aniyan Bhava Chettan Bhava in a 1995 Indian Malayalam film directed by Rajasenan and produced by Nazeer Nettoor and Remis Raja. The film stars S.P. Venkatesh, Jayaram, Narendra Prasad, Kasturi, Prem Kumar, Sangeetha and Rajan P. Dev in the lead roles. The film had musical score by S.P. Venkatesh.

Title: Kaatrinile Varum Geetham
Description: Kaatrinile Varum Geetham is a 1978 Indian Tamil film, directed by Sp. Muthuraman and produced by S. Bhaskar. The film stars Muthuraman and Kavitha in lead roles. The film has musical score by Ilaiyaraaja.

Title: Kadaladu Vadaladu
Description: Kadaladu Vadaladu is a 1969 Indian Telugu film directed by B. Vittalacharya and produced by Gutta Subba Rao. The film stars N. T. Rama Rao and Jayalalitha in the lead roles. Music of the film was composed by T V Raju.

Title: Sumangali
Description: Sumangali is a 1983 Indian Tamil film, directed by D. Yoganand and produced by D. Yoganand. The film stars Sivaji Ganesan ,Prabhu ,Sujatha, Geetha, Y. G. Mahendran and Silk Smitha in lead roles. The film has musical score by M. S. Viswanathan.

Title: Sigappu Malargal
Description: Sigappu Malargal is a 1986 Indian Tamil movie directed by S. A. Chandrasekhar and produced by Sivappu Puligal. The film stars Vijayakanth and Sulakshana in lead roles. Music of the film was composed by M. S. Viswanathan and Sankar Ganesh.

Title: Kaval Poonaikal
Description: Kaval Poonaikal is a 1989 Indian Tamil film, directed by Kalaipuli Sekaran and produced by G. Samundeeswari. The film stars Banuchandar and Radhika in lead roles. Music of the film was composed by Deva.
